016package org.consensusj.currency;
017
018import org.javamoney.moneta.CurrencyUnitBuilder;
019
020import javax.money.CurrencyContext;
021import javax.money.CurrencyContextBuilder;
022import javax.money.CurrencyQuery;
023import javax.money.CurrencyUnit;
024import javax.money.spi.CurrencyProviderSpi;
025import java.util.Set;
026
027/**
028 *  A BitcoinCurrencyProvider based on work in the javamoney-shelter.
029 *
030 * @author Sean Gilligan
031 * @author Werner Keil
032 */
033public class BitcoinCurrencyProvider implements CurrencyProviderSpi {
034    private final static int bitcoinFractionDigits = 8;
035
036    private static final CurrencyContext CONTEXT = CurrencyContextBuilder.of("BitcoinCurrencyContextProvider")
037            .build();
038
039    private final Set<CurrencyUnit> bitcoinSet;
040
041    public BitcoinCurrencyProvider() {
042        CurrencyUnit btcUnit = CurrencyUnitBuilder.of("BTC", CONTEXT)
043                .setDefaultFractionDigits(bitcoinFractionDigits)
044                .build();
045        bitcoinSet = Set.of(btcUnit);
046    }
047    
048    /**
049     * Return a {@link CurrencyUnit} instances matching the given
050     * {@link javax.money.CurrencyQuery}.
051     *
052     * @param query the {@link javax.money.CurrencyQuery} containing the parameters determining the query. not null.
053     * @return the corresponding {@link CurrencyUnit}s matching, never null.
054     */
055    @Override
056    public Set<CurrencyUnit> getCurrencies(CurrencyQuery query){
057        // Query for currencyCode BTC or default query returns bitcoinSet else emptySet.
058        return (query.getCurrencyCodes().contains("BTC") ||
059                query.getCurrencyCodes().isEmpty()) ? bitcoinSet : Set.of();
060    }
061}
